⚙️ Class Generation Settings

These settings control how classes are generated in the 📋 Students section.

Min Students/Class: Minimum students needed to form a class
Max Students/Class: Maximum students allowed per class

📊 Current Settings

• Classes need at least 5 students to be generated

• Classes can have up to 10 students maximum

🧹 Database Cleanup

Remove orphan records and fix inconsistent data.

📋 Issues Found:

🔧 Date Repair Tool

Scans all classes and prescheduled slots for start dates that don't match their scheduled day (e.g. a Sunday class with a Monday start date). Fixes by shifting the date to the correct day of the week.

🔧 Fix Unlinked Student Records

Scans all active classes for students with temporary IDs (no proper Firestore record). Creates real scheduler_students docs for each one and updates the class with the correct IDs. Run this once to fix students added before this issue was resolved.

🎯 Drill Maker

Generate phrase drills or full sentence drills using Korean grammar points. AI will create practice content based on your inputs.

Chunk training / pattern training — outputs incomplete English phrases for students to complete in Korean.

All sentences will use the same grammar structure.

Enter one grammar point for Fixed mode.

1 clause only. No conjunctions. No quoting. Simple subject + verb. e.g. "I eat breakfast."

📋 Generated Drill

🧠

Generating drill with AI...

📄 Homework Maker

Generate 4 structured PDFs: Translation Sheet, Student Production Sheet, Direct Answer Key, and Natural Answer Key.

Pull from Noun Generator if available

📄 Generated Homework

📄

Generating homework with AI... This may take a moment.

📝 Scenario-Based Noun Generator

Generate 50 nouns related to a scenario, sorted from most to least commonly used. Use them inside drills and homework.

🎉 Final Week Reminder!

🎓

This is the LAST WEEK of the 6-week course!

Please remind your students about the KoreanLearnin Community programs!

🗣️ Suggested script:

"Congratulations on finishing the course! If you'd like to continue learning and get conversational in Korean within 1 year, consider joining our programs!"

💰 Pricing Options

🌟 1-Year Mastery Program: $500/year

→ Since you paid $200 for this course, it's only $300 to upgrade!

⚡ Sign up THIS WEEK to get a $200 discount code!

📅 Monthly Program: $89/month
